_meta.title: BTS SEO Findings Ledger
_meta.description: Single canonical backlog of SEO findings. Seeded from docs/audit/2026-05-30/SITE-AUDIT.md (13-skill per-lens audit). SKILLS OWN FINDINGS; SCRIPTS OWN NUMBERS. This file holds issue-tracking data ONLY — it must never carry healthScore/geoScore/geoReadiness. Other data files (seo.json p0Blockers/criticalFixesOutstanding/seoAudit.actions, section.json skills_needed) reference findings here by id rather than duplicating them.

ownerLegend.us: CAIRR produces the next deliverable (content/copy/FAQ/internal-linking plan/llms.txt draft/script). Sunny still publishes per the consultation model.
ownerLegend.sunny: Action is a WordPress-admin setting, plugin, theme, schema config, server header, GBP, GA4, or legal-page publish that only Sunny's access can perform.

findings.title: HTTP/HTTPS misconfiguration (root cause: WordPress Site/Home URL set to http://)
findings.recommendation: Set WordPress Address + Site Address to https:// then add a server 301 http->https (force SSL). This corrects canonicals, sitemap <loc>s, robots.txt sitemap line, schema @ids and og:url sitewide. Then disable the second canonical/OG emitter (theme vs Yoast — keep Yoast), add HSTS, switch the marker-icon to https, and resubmit the https sitemap in GSC + Bing.
findings.evidence: http:// serves 200 OK full page with no 301; two rel=canonical (http+https) on course/post/home; all 6 sitemap <loc> http://; Yoast @ids http:// (10 http vs 5 https) on acs-reassessment; no HSTS header.

findings.title: No privacy policy / terms; UK GDPR exposure on lead forms
findings.recommendation: Publish an accessible privacy policy (+ terms) linked in the footer sitewide; add a privacy notice near each form submit; confirm the policy URL is indexable.
findings.evidence: No privacy/terms link on homepage or any crawled page; no privacy-policy URL in page-sitemap.xml; enquiry/contact forms collect personal data.

findings.title: Repurposed testimonials imply a training track record that does not exist (claim/E-E-A-T/ACL risk)
findings.recommendation: Re-attribute the Charter Gas reviews to Sunny's prior gas-installation work (clearly labelled) or remove from sales/training pages until genuine post-cohort student feedback exists. Never imply a BTS training track record.
findings.evidence: 'What Our Clients Say' shows ~10-year Charter Gas relationship reviews as training-centre testimonials, reused on a course sales page beneath £4,250-£7,549+VAT pricing; BTS has trained nobody (courses just started).

findings.title: Blog author is the agency consultant, not a BTS gas expert (YMYL E-E-A-T + relationship exposure)
findings.recommendation: Attribute posts to Sunny or a named gas-qualified BTS instructor with a credential bio (us drafts byline/bio); Sunny updates the WP post author and the Person @id/jobTitle/sameAs in schema.
findings.fixingSection: content-compliance (us drafts byline; Sunny updates WP author + schema)
findings.evidence: Page meta and Article/Person JSON-LD name 'Adam Rappolt' (CAIRR consultant) as author of YMYL gas-safety content.

findings.title: Full 8-service catalogue under-linked from hubs (orphaned course pages)
findings.recommendation: Rebuild hub and category pages to internally link all course pages with descriptive anchors (hub-and-spoke); verify each of the 8 services has a unique 800+ word optimised /course/ page.
findings.evidence: Courses hub surfaces only 5 courses; category pages funnel to a single course; course-sitemap.xml exposes 11 live course URLs. Under-linking, not absence (refutes 'only 1 of 8 has a page').

findings.title: Geo-targeting inconsistent (High Wycombe vs Greater London)
findings.recommendation: Anchor title/meta/H1/schema NAP to High Wycombe HP11 with national delivery as a clearly secondary message. Set GBP to a High Wycombe location-based profile with a defined city/postcode service area (not 'UK', per Google June-2025 SAB rule).
findings.evidence: Title+meta target 'Greater London'/national while H1, body (HP11 2LB x7) and schema NAP target High Wycombe.

findings.title: Course price display inconsistent across course pages
findings.recommendation: Display a transparent price (or 'from £X') + 'what's included' on every course page; mirror in Offer/hasCourseInstance. Confirm pricing with Sunny before publishing.
findings.fixingSection: on-page-content (us drafts price blocks; confirm w/ Sunny)
findings.evidence: ccn1-initial £1079+VAT; unvented Offer 195 GBP; ccn1-re-assessment shows duration but no price; gas-MLP £4250-7549+VAT — inconsistent and partly gated behind 'Book Now / Contact me'.

findings.title: Blog post has zero <h1> in served HTML
findings.recommendation: Output the post title as a single <h1> (enable the theme page-title bar / set the title element to H1) and verify in served HTML; render a visible byline + published/updated date (currently only in JSON-LD).
findings.evidence: Served HTML of the post contains no <h1>; title renders as styled text.

findings.title: Images: missing alt text + no WebP/AVIF (LCP and image-search loss)
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt to all informative images (us can draft alt copy); convert photos to WebP/AVIF via a WP image-opt/CDN plugin (1.4 MB hero -> ~150-250 KB); remove lazy from the hero and add fetchpriority=high; add >=1 in-content image to blog/course pages.
findings.fixingSection: media-images (Sunny: WP media/plugin/theme; us supplies alt copy)
findings.evidence: 17 of 18 homepage images have empty alt; 46 PNG refs, 0 WebP; likely-LCP hero BTS-landing-page-pic-2.png is 1.4 MB and loading=lazy with no fetchpriority.

findings.title: Weak off-site entity / brand-mention signals (GEO)
findings.recommendation: Build off-site entity signals (YouTube explainers, Reddit participation, a LinkedIn company page with consistent NAP) and add the new profiles to Organization sameAs.
findings.evidence: Org sameAs lists only LinkedIn/Instagram/Twitter — no YouTube/Reddit/Wikipedia, which correlate most strongly with AI citations.

findings.title: No comparison / bottom-of-funnel intent pages
findings.recommendation: Create honest comparison-intent content (e.g. /best-acs-training-courses-uk/ roundup, 'ACS reassessment near me' geo pages) with a price/duration/location matrix vs Logic4training/Develop Training; reframe /why-train-with-us/ to 'why us vs other ACS centres' with a feature/benefit matrix (forward-looking, no fabricated claims).
findings.evidence: No 'X vs Y'/'alternative'/'best ACS training near me'/comparison pages exist; differentiation page (~2,130 words) contains zero comparative language.

findings.title: Thin trust/authority architecture for a new provider
findings.recommendation: Add an About/instructors page (Sunny's experience + quals, instructor bios), display only accreditations the centre actually holds with descriptive alt (state 'pending' plainly if applicable), and prepare a review structure for post-launch — no fabricated claims.
findings.fixingSection: about-trust-page (us drafts; needs instructor details from Sunny)
findings.evidence: No About/instructor-credentials page; 'Our Expert Team' has an empty instructor heading (Matt, no bio); 'Our Accreditations' shows only Sunny's installer Gas Safe logo (empty alt).

findings.title: Thin conversion path on course/category pages
findings.recommendation: Add a prominent enquiry/booking CTA + course-date availability on every course page (us can draft CTA copy); configure conversion events (click-to-call, form_submit, mailto) in GTM/GA4.
findings.fixingSection: geo-gbp (Sunny: GA4/GTM events; us supplies CTA copy)
findings.evidence: Single tel: link is the only obvious CTA; no booking/enquiry funnel or course dates on category pages; GA4 has no conversion events (ties to Conversions tab reading 0).

findings.title: Indexed pages missing privacy policy + duplicate contact URLs
findings.recommendation: Consolidate the two contact pages to one canonical (301 the other); add the privacy policy (see F2) and the About page (when approved by Sunny).
findings.evidence: 12 pages indexed with no privacy-policy URL and no About page; both /contact-form/ and /contact-us/ present (duplicate/competing).

findings.title: Schema coverage inconsistent across course pages (NOT 'no schema')
findings.recommendation: Add Course + Offer schema to every course page missing it (starting with ccn1-re-assessment); standardise the Course template.
findings.evidence: Valid Course+Offer+hasCourseInstance on unvented and ccn1-initial, but ccn1-re-assessment has only BreadcrumbList/WebPage/WebSite.

findings.title: Two competing Organization entities in schema
findings.recommendation: Unify into a single canonical #organization node (disable Yoast auto-Organization or merge properties); simplify the homepage to one OfferCatalog of 8 Courses each with a url to its /course/ page; add GeoCoordinates, telephone, openingHours, and real GBP/Facebook/LinkedIn sameAs.
findings.evidence: Hand-coded LocalBusiness+EducationalOrganization (@id #organization) is not linked into the Yoast @graph; Yoast emits its own Organization node; homepage hasOfferCatalog wraps Courses as thin stubs.

findings.title: Duplicate / weak heading structure (beyond the missing-H1 post)
findings.recommendation: Keep one H1 in the hero, demote the duplicate to span/H2; wrap the price in a non-heading element and reserve H2 for content sections.
findings.evidence: Homepage emits a duplicate identical <h1>; first H2 on ccn1-initial is price markup ('£1079 + VAT').

findings.title: Duplicate / thin category page metadata + shallow internal clustering
findings.recommendation: Unique meta description + H1 per category page (us drafts copy); build hub-and-spoke clusters with contextual links from blog/news/FAQ into matching service pages.
findings.evidence: Gas and plumbing category pages share an identical meta description; clustering is one-directional (category -> single course).

findings.title: Blog posts weak on internal links + GEO citability structure
findings.recommendation: Add 2-3 contextual internal links + CTA per post; add question-form H2/H3 mirroring search queries; lead with a 40-60 word definitional answer; add a comparison table and a self-contained FAQ block (134-167 word answers); add a 'What is BTS / What courses' definitional block on the homepage.
findings.evidence: Long-form posts have no internal links to course/contact pages; H2s all statement-style (zero question headings); no comparison tables, definitional opening, or FAQ block.

findings.title: Missing security headers (clickjacking + policy gaps)
findings.recommendation: Add X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, and a Content-Security-Policy (report-only first); drop the deprecated X-XSS-Protection.
findings.evidence: No CSP/X-Frame-Options/Referrer-Policy; only x-content-type-options nosniff plus deprecated x-xss-protection.

findings.title: Render-blocking head resources (performance/LCP)
findings.recommendation: Defer/async non-critical JS, inline critical CSS (e.g. via SG Optimizer once activated). Pairs with F9 image work.
findings.evidence: 5 stylesheets + 6 scripts load before content; combined with the 1.4 MB PNG hero (F9) this risks LCP.

findings.title: No /llms.txt (AI-crawler guidance)
findings.recommendation: Publish /llms.txt at root — title, description, bullet links to the 8 courses + About + contact, plus short citable passages (us drafts the file; Sunny/host places it at root).
findings.evidence: /llms.txt returns 404; no structured AI-crawler guidance file.

findings.title: Archive sitemap bloat (author/category/tag) + contributor-handle leak
findings.recommendation: Noindex + exclude author/date/sparse-tag archives in Yoast (keep pages, posts, course CPT); reassign/clean the charliebusinessclan-com contributor; retain only categories with unique intro content (add 100-200 word intros).
findings.evidence: Author archives expose /author/adam/ and /author/charliebusinessclan-com/ (the latter leaks a non-brand handle); author/category/tag sitemaps add thin URLs on a 28-post site.

findings.title: Course catalogue uncertainty (CCN1 Initial / LPG Changeover live but flagged internally)
findings.recommendation: Confirm with Sunny whether CCN1 Initial + LPG Changeover are offered; if not, unpublish/redirect. Verify all 11 course URLs return 200.
findings.evidence: course-sitemap.xml lists 11 live indexable URLs including ccn1-initial and lpg-changeover — both OPEN QUESTIONS in CLAUDE.md; no 'Foundation Skills Gas Course' URL (the internal 404 correctly absent).

findings.title: Homepage title tag too long
findings.recommendation: Shorten to ~55-60 chars, leading with the primary keyword (us drafts the title; applied via Yoast).
findings.evidence: Homepage title is 86 chars and will truncate in SERPs.

findings.title: WordPress endpoints exposed (XML-RPC attack surface, no SEO value)
findings.recommendation: Disable XML-RPC; remove RSD/WLW manifest links.
findings.evidence: Homepage head exposes xmlrpc.php?rsd plus RSD/WLW manifest links.

findings.title: No IndexNow (slower Bing/Yandex indexing)
findings.recommendation: Enable IndexNow (Bing key or WP plugin) to push new URLs on publish.
findings.evidence: No IndexNow key file or configuration detected.

findings.title: No explicit AI-crawler directives in robots.txt
findings.recommendation: Add explicit Allow for AI crawlers (GPTBot/OAI-SearchBot/ClaudeBot/PerplexityBot), optionally Disallow CCBot (us drafts the directive block). Nothing is blocked today (allow-all default).
findings.evidence: robots.txt is the Yoast default (User-agent: * / Disallow:) with no AI-crawler intent signalled.

findings.title: Location/hub-spoke cross-linking incomplete
findings.recommendation: Add contextual links from each location page to the South-East guide hub; hub links to all 6; optional neighbour cross-links. No duplication/doorway risk at current ~6-page volume — re-check at 10-12 pages.
findings.evidence: Location spokes do not link back to the regional South-East hub and do not cross-link each other.
